name: JATT II Acquisition Corp.
business: JATT II Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It intends to focus on healthcare or healthcare-related industries, with a primary focus on biotechnology and broader life sciences. The company has not selected any specific business combination target and has no operations.

exposures.sentence: Our business strategy is to leverage our network of relationships, therapeutic development experience and capital markets expertise to identify and complete our initial business combination with a company in the healthcare or healthcare-related industries, with a primary focus on biotechnology and broader life sciences.
